headline: Real Home Prices Plunge To Lowest Level Since 2014: Are Luxury Sales 'Inflating' Data?
summary: New home prices hit a "real" low since 2014 as the "widest" gap on record suggests luxury sales are "inflating" data.

headline: Zillow CEO Says Housing Affordability Still Pressuring Buyers Amid Soft Q2 Outlook: 'Seeing Very Modest Gains…'
summary: Zillow CEO Jeremy Wacksman said affordability pressures and cautious buyers continue weighing on the U.S. housing market.
